name: Strategic Management
description: Evaluates strategic account planning, relationship depth, and long-term value creation.

criteria.name: Account & Industry Knowledge
criteria.description: Demonstrates deep understanding of the account's strategy, market, and competitive landscape

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No preparation or account knowledge evident

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Basic company info only

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Knows industry trends but not account-specific strategy

levels.label: Good
levels.description: References account's strategic priorities and market position

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Insight-level knowledge that impresses the client

criteria.name: Relationship Mapping & Expansion
criteria.description: Navigates stakeholder relationships and expands influence within the account

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: Single-threaded, no awareness of other stakeholders

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Knows of others but hasn't engaged them

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Multi-threaded but relationships are shallow

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Strong multi-threaded relationships across departments

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Trusted advisor status with executive sponsorship

criteria.name: Long-term Value Creation
criteria.description: Positions as a strategic partner, not just a vendor

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: Transactional approach, product-focused only

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Tries to upsell without strategic context

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Some strategic vision but not connected to client goals

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Clear partnership vision aligned with client's roadmap

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Co-creates strategic value that transforms the account

criteria.name: Execution & Follow-through
criteria.description: Demonstrates reliability, follow-up discipline, and action orientation

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: No follow-up commitments or action items

levels.label: Below Average
levels.description: Vague promises with no specifics

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Action items identified but not locked down

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Clear actions with owners, dates, and accountability

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Proactive follow-through plan that builds confidence
